location: Inside a chest in a small underground chamber at Tombsward Ruins, past two crossbow-armed Page enemies in a dark corridor reached via the central staircase.
region: Weeping Peninsula (western, north of the Weeping Evergaol)
tactics: Bring a torch or light source for the dark underground corridor
Two crossbow-armed Pages guard the hallway — consider luring them back outside into open space rather than fighting in the cramped dark
No Site of Grace exists at the ruins itself, so approach from a nearby grace
An Incantation Scarab (Divine Fortification) sits on the surface near the ruins, worth grabbing on the same trip
lore: A scythe styled after a pair of white wings, said in old pagan belief to belong to gentle envoys of Death — a quietly unsettling pairing of holy imagery with a weapon built for reaping lives.

builds.name: Faith bleed/holy hybrid
builds.why: Faith is its largest scaling stat, ahead of Dexterity and Strength, and its Angel's Wings skill blocks the target's flask use for 30 seconds
